nodes.label: Timeline Screen — Color-coded events + NowLine indicator
nodes.description: Daily schedule timeline view showing Google Calendar sync status ('sincronizado'), time-coded event blocks from 7:30am to 9:00pm. Current event 'Gym' at 6:30pm highlighted in neon green with 'AHORA' badge. NowLine rendered as a horizontal green line at 7:25pm with pill label showing current time. Past events rendered with left violet/blue accent bars. Categories shown as inline chips: Recordatorio (violet), Reunión (blue), Personal, Pausa. Pending section 'SIN HORA · 1 PENDIENTE' shows recurring task 'Hidratarse'. Footer shows 'Coach Mentex está observando tu día'. Google Calendar avatar icon on each synced event.
ui_elements: NowLine (horizontal green line + time pill at 7:25pm)
Event category chips: Recordatorio (violet), Reunión (blue), Personal, Pausa
Google Calendar sync indicator (green dot + 'sincronizado' label + Desconectar CTA)
Google Calendar avatar icons per synced event
Checkmark completion circle on past events
nodes.app_state: Active session, current time 7:25pm, Gym is current event (AHORA)

edges.description: Both screens share active session context: timeline NowLine reflects real-time position; IA chat references '15 min restantes' session state. The IA scheduling intent ('Organiza el horario') directly affects the timeline layout.
Timeline is the schedule view complementing the Home ritual/reminders overview; 'Hidratarse' recurring task appears in both screens (SIN HORA section in timeline, Recordatorios in Home).
